reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Always attentive to tourists and ready to help with route questions; excellent customer service from their staff...

reviews.comment:
Pequeña estación de servicio, única en la zona. Por ello es que se forman largas colas y hay poco personal para atender.
El Servicompras es pequeño, mal atendido (sin ganas), con pocas opciones y ni siquiera azúcar/edulcorante para el café (tampoco leche!!!).

(Translated by Google)
A small gas station, the only one in the area. This is why there are long lines and few staff to serve customers.
The Servicompras is small, poorly staffed (lack of enthusiasm), with few options and not even sugar or sweetener for the coffee (or milk!!!).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwOF9qYThnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención de los playeros. Ir con tiempo, ya que al ser la única estación en Santa Clara, hay muchos autos haciendo fila.

(Translated by Google)
The attendants are very helpful. Go early, as it's the only station in Santa Clara and there's often a long line of cars.
